# About Vegan Tattoo Studios

There are so many vegan tattoo artists – it seems that tattooing and veganism go together so well as each is stand and dedication for life, that the creation of a community interested in both was only a matter of a time. We have decided to do just that and help build this community by connecting world tattoo masters, studios and their potential clients. All so we can help the community to grow and blossom!

We aim to make it easy to find the right master for your future vegan tattoo by making all vegan tattoo artists and studios available to search for in one place – **vegantattoostudios.com**. We’ll also have everything you need to know about vegan tattooing that differentiates you from normal tattooists. Here you can not only find the right match but get extra information you may need to make your tattoo experience flawless and pleasant.

Please check out the articles section to find all the information about vegan tattoos, and the ‘store’ section where you’ll find a number of vegan tattoo aftercare products! Spread the world! 

\*\*\*Become a part of the community!\*\*\*

Please [**contact us**](https://vegantattoostudios.com/contact-us/) for any questions or assistance.
